description_long: This object is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard rectangular shape and a slightly curved profile. The keyboard features a complete set of alphanumeric keys, a numeric keypad on the right, and a row of function keys along the top. The keycaps are flat and closely spaced, with visible legends that appear to be in English. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of plastic, with some minor scuffing and discoloration suggesting moderate use. The keyboard does not display any visible branding or logos, and there are no cables or wireless receivers attached. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a light gray color dominating the exterior.
description: A full-size, light gray computer keyboard with a numeric keypad and English key labels, showing signs of moderate use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main alphanumeric section and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the keyboard's slim, slightly angled shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keyboard and the arrangement of the keys from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin, angled design.
